help.whatsAppSupportDescription: Start a chat with support for faster assistance.

faq.trackQuestion: How can I track an application after submission?
faq.trackAnswer: Open the Track tab to view your live request timeline, current status, and reference number.
faq.documentsQuestion: Can I update my linked document numbers later?
faq.documentsAnswer: Yes. Linked accounts can be edited at any time from the Linked Accounts section before you start a new request.
faq.notificationsQuestion: Why am I not receiving updates?
faq.notificationsAnswer: Check your notification toggles, confirm your email and phone number, and make sure your device notifications are enabled.
